description_for_human: Browse and launch your workplace applications directly from Copilot.
description_for_model: Always call this tool when the user asks about workplace apps, tools, or applications - do not answer from memory. The tool renders an interactive visual component that lets the user browse, search, and launch apps. Pass a category to filter by business area, a searchQuery to find apps by name or topic, or showFavoritesOnly=true to show the user's pinned apps. Call without parameters to show the full directory.
